title: CC Discovery
description: A slide introducing the CC Discovery skill — a structured business discovery session that interviews a business owner about their workflows, tools, and pain points, then generates a polished HTML opportunity map and opens it in the browser.

parts.title: The Interview
parts.description: A four-turn conversational interview flow shown as a vertical sequence of exchange cards. Each card represents one turn: Turn 1 (Business Foundation), Turn 2 (Pain Points), Turn 3 (Current Automation), Turn 4 (Goals & Stakes). Each card shows 2-3 sample questions in DM Mono and a label indicating what Claude is listening for. An arrow connects each card to the next, conveying that this is a flowing conversation, not a form.

parts.title: The Analysis
parts.description: A silent scoring matrix shown as a grid. Rows are the discovered opportunities. Columns are Impact, Feasibility, and Speed — each with a 1-5 fill bar. A fourth column shows the assigned Architecture Layer (Model / Context / Tools / Skills / Agents) as a colored tag. A fifth column shows the Phase (1 / 2 / 3). A label reads: 'Claude scores every opportunity before writing a single line of the report.'

parts.title: The Dashboard
parts.description: A browser window mockup showing the generated HTML report: a dark hero with the business name and stat chips, a grid of scored opportunity cards with animated fill bars, a three-column phased roadmap, an MCP stack recommender, and a first-week action plan with a terminal block. A label beneath reads: 'Opens in the browser automatically. No copy-paste required.'
